outcomes.name: Interacting
outcomes.description: uses the target language to exchange information, ideas and opinions

outcomes.name: Responding
outcomes.description: responds to information and ideas in a range of texts

outcomes.name: Composing
outcomes.description: composes texts in the target language, using a range of linguistic structures for different audiences

outcomes.name: Role of language, culture and identity
outcomes.description: identifies how language use reflects cultural ideas, values and beliefs

outcomes.name: Language awareness and building
outcomes.description: identifies protocols, programs and techniques to maintain and build Aboriginal Languages

outcomes.name: Interacting in Auslan
outcomes.description: exchanges information, opinions and ideas using a range of linguistic structures and protocols appropriate for different audiences

outcomes.name: Understanding texts in Auslan
outcomes.description: explains how texts represent information, opinions and/or ideas and responds in Auslan and/or English

outcomes.name: Creating texts in Auslan
outcomes.description: creates informative and imaginative texts for different contexts and audiences using a range of linguistic structures

outcomes.name: Role of language, culture and identity
outcomes.description: explains the relationship between language, culture and identity

outcomes.name: Understanding texts
outcomes.description: interprets and responds to information to demonstrate understanding of a range of predictable texts

outcomes.name: Understanding texts
outcomes.description: translates a range of predictable texts into English

outcomes.name: Intercultural understanding
outcomes.description: describes the relationship between contemporary and target languages, culture(s) and identity

outcomes.name: Reading, viewing and listening to texts
outcomes.description: uses a range of personal, creative and critical strategies to read texts that are complex in their ideas and construction

outcomes.name: Understanding and responding to texts A
outcomes.description: analyses how meaning is created through the use of and response to language forms, features and structures

outcomes.name: Understanding and responding to texts B
outcomes.description: examines and explains how texts represent ideas, experiences and values

outcomes.name: Understanding and responding to texts C
outcomes.description: identifies and explains ways of valuing texts and the connections between them

outcomes.name: Expressing ideas and composing texts A
outcomes.description: creates personal, creative and critical texts for a range of audiences by using linguistic and stylistic conventions of language to express ideas

outcomes.name: Expressing ideas and composing texts B
outcomes.description: uses processes of planning, monitoring, revising and reflecting to support and develop composition of texts

outcomes.name: Working mathematically
outcomes.description: develops understanding and fluency in mathematics through exploring and connecting mathematical concepts, choosing and applying mathematical techniques to solve problems, and communicating their thinking and reasoning coherently and clearly

outcomes.name: Computation with integers
outcomes.description: compares, orders and calculates with integers to solve problems

outcomes.name: Fractions, decimals and percentages
outcomes.description: represents and operates with fractions, decimals and percentages to solve problems

outcomes.name: Ratios and rates
outcomes.description: solves problems involving ratios and rates, and analyses distance–time graphs

outcomes.name: Algebraic techniques
outcomes.description: generalises number properties to operate with algebraic expressions including expansion and factorisation

outcomes.name: Indices
outcomes.description: operates with primes and roots, positive‑integer and zero indices involving numerical bases and establishes the relevant index laws

outcomes.name: Equations
outcomes.description: solves linear equations of up to 2 steps and quadratic equations of the form x² = k

outcomes.name: Linear relationships
outcomes.description: creates and displays number patterns and finds graphical solutions to problems involving linear relationships

outcomes.name: Length
outcomes.description: applies knowledge of the perimeter of plane shapes and the circumference of circles to solve problems

outcomes.name: Pythagoras’ theorem
outcomes.description: applies Pythagoras’ theorem to solve problems in various contexts

outcomes.name: Area
outcomes.description: applies knowledge of area and composite area involving triangles, quadrilaterals and circles to solve problems

outcomes.name: Volume
outcomes.description: applies knowledge of volume and capacity to solve problems involving right prisms and cylinders

outcomes.name: Angle relationships
outcomes.description: applies angle relationships to solve problems, including those related to transversals on sets of parallel lines

outcomes.name: Properties of geometrical figures
outcomes.description: identifies and applies the properties of triangles and quadrilaterals to solve problems

outcomes.name: Data classification and visualisation
outcomes.description: classifies and displays data using a variety of graphical representations

outcomes.name: Data analysis
outcomes.description: analyses simple datasets using measures of centre, range and shape of the data

outcomes.name: Probability
outcomes.description: solves problems involving the probabilities of simple chance experiments

outcomes.name: Interacting
outcomes.description: exchanges information and opinions in a range of familiar contexts by using culturally appropriate language

outcomes.name: Understanding texts
outcomes.description: interprets and responds to information, opinions and ideas in texts to demonstrate understanding

outcomes.name: Creating texts
outcomes.description: creates a range of texts for familiar communicative purposes by using culturally appropriate language
